response:
Nurse Emily organizes a creative writing workshop for the older adults in her care facility, ensuring that every resident has the opportunity to participate. She divides the 24 residents into groups of 6, resulting in 4 groups in total. To support the writing session, Emily prepares 3 writing prompts for each group, which totals 12 prompts. 

In addition, Emily has prepared an extra set of 10 prompts to be shared equally among all the groups. These prompts will be distributed so that each group can have an equal opportunity to engage further with the activity. 

Emily also makes use of the facility's library to gather a wide variety of writing prompts, ensuring that the content is diverse and engaging. She plans to revisit the library later to update the prompt collection and keep the workshop fresh and stimulating for the residents.

The total number of writing prompts Emily needs to have prepared for the session, including both the initial and extra prompts, is 12 + 10 = 22. 

The END.
